inputs.label: Planned Duration (months)
inputs.businessContext: Original planned project duration in months as per baseline schedule.

businessContext_i18n.en: Original planned project duration in months as per baseline schedule.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Temel takvime göre orijinal planlanan proje süresi (ay cinsinden).
businessContext_i18n.de: Ursprünglich geplante Projektdauer in Monaten gemäß Basisplan.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée initiale prévue du projet en mois selon le calendrier de référence
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración original planificada del proyecto en meses según el cronograma base.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المدة الأصلية المخطط لها للمشروع بالأشهر وفقًا للجدول الأساسي.

inputs.label: Actual Duration to Date (months)
inputs.businessContext: Elapsed time since project start, used to compute schedule performance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Elapsed time since project start, used to compute schedule performance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proje başlangıcından bu yana geçen süre, takvim performansını hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Verstrichene Zeit seit Projektstart, zur Berechnung der Termintreue.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps écoulé depuis le début du projet, utilisé pour calculer la performance du calendrier
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo transcurrido desde el inicio del proyecto, utilizado para calcular el rendimiento del cronograma.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوقت المنقضي منذ بدء المشروع، يُستخدم لحساب أداء الجدول الزمني.

inputs.label: Planned Total Cost (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total budgeted cost for the project at completion.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total budgeted cost for the project at completion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Projenin tamamlanması için bütçelenen toplam maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtbudget für das Projekt bei Abschluss.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total budgété pour le projet à son achèvement
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total presupuestado para el proyecto al finalizar.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي التكلفة المدرجة في الميزانية للمشروع عند الاكتمال.

inputs.label: Actual Cost Incurred (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Total costs actually incurred up to the current reporting period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total costs actually incurred up to the current reporting period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut raporlama dönemine kadar fiilen gerçekleşen toplam maliyetler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bis zum aktuellen Berichtszeitraum tatsächlich angefallene Kosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coûts totaux réellement engagés jusqu'à la période de rapport actuelle
businessContext_i18n.es: Costos totales realmente incurridos hasta el período de informe actual.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي التكاليف المتكبدة فعليًا حتى فترة التقرير الحالية.

inputs.label: Percent Complete (%)
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage of work completed based on earned value or physical progress.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated percentage of work completed based on earned value or physical progress.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kazanılmış değer veya fiziksel ilerlemeye dayalı olarak tahmini tamamlanma yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Prozentsatz der abgeschlossenen Arbeiten basierend auf Earned Value oder physischem Fortschritt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage estimé des travaux achevés basé sur la valeur acquise ou l'avancement physique
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje estimado de trabajo completado basado en el valor ganado o el progreso físico.
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة المئوية المقدرة للعمل المنجز بناءً على القيمة المكتسبة أو التقدم المادي.

inputs.label: Scope Change Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Frequency of scope changes affecting project baseline. Low = 0-1 changes, Moderate = 2-4, High = 5+.

businessContext_i18n.en: Frequency of scope changes affecting project baseline. Low = 0-1 changes, Moderate = 2-4, High = 5+.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Proje temelini etkileyen kapsam değişikliklerinin sıklığı. Düşük = 0-1 değişiklik, Orta = 2-4, Yüksek = 5+.
businessContext_i18n.de: Häufigkeit von Umfangsänderungen, die den Projektbasisplan beeinflussen. Niedrig = 0–1 Änderungen, Mittel = 2–4, Hoch = 5+.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence des changements de périmètre affectant la référence du projet. Faible = 0-1 changements, Modérée = 2-4, Élevée = 5+.
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia de cambios de alcance que afectan la línea base del proyecto. Baja = 0-1 cambios, Moderada = 2-4, Alta = 5+.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تكرار تغييرات النطاق التي تؤثر على خط الأساس للمشروع. منخفض = 0-1 تغيير، متوسط = 2-4، مرتفع = 5+.

inputs.label: Team Experience Level
inputs.businessContext: Average experience level of the core project team.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average experience level of the core project team.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Niveau d'expérience moyen de l'équipe principale du projet
businessContext_i18n.es: Nivel de experiencia promedio del equipo central del proyecto.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط مستوى خبرة فريق العمل الأساسي.

inputs.label: Quality Defect Rate (defects per unit)
inputs.businessContext: Number of defects per unit of output (e.g., per 1000 lines of code, per 100 parts).

label_i18n.fr: Taux de défauts qualité (défauts par unité)
label_i18n.es: Tasa de defectos de calidad (defectos por unidad)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of defects per unit of output (e.g., per 1000 lines of code, per 100 parts).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birim çıktı başına kusur sayısı (ör. 1000 kod satırı başına, 100 parça başına).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Fehler pro Ausgabeeinheit (z. B. pro 1000 Codezeilen, pro 100 Teile).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de défauts par unité de production (par exemple, pour 1000 lignes de code, pour 100 pièces).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de defectos por unidad de producción (por ejemplo, por cada 1000 líneas de código, por cada 100 piezas).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد العيوب لكل وحدة إنتاج (مثل: لكل 1000 سطر من الكود، لكل 100 قطعة).

rules.message: Actual duration exceeds planned duration. Schedule overrun is already present.
Actual cost exceeds planned total cost. Cost overrun is already present.
Percent complete must be between 0 and 100.
Quality defect rate must be between 0 and 1.
Supplier reliability index must be between 0 and 1.

thresholds.message: Schedule performance index below 0.8 – high risk of schedule overrun.
Cost performance index below 0.8 – high risk of cost overrun.
Overall overrun risk index exceeds 0.7 – immediate management attention required.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
